evals.prompt: Use this profile to build the complete system now. The profile contains one work stream and says external publishing needs approval.
evals.expected_output: Creates an incremental architecture with a publishing gate, starts with the minimum skill graph, and stops for approval before setup.
assertions: The response proposes an incremental first rollout centered on the single work stream.
The response keeps external publishing behind an explicit human approval gate.
The response requires blueprint approval before setup or installation.

evals.prompt: My existing Obsidian vault has Prompts, Research, Decision Records, Memory, and project folders. Replace it with PARA and make one mega-skill for marketing.
evals.expected_output: Preserves the working taxonomy, explains why title-based mega-skills are weak, and proposes a small graph around actual work streams.
assertions: The response preserves the named existing vault taxonomy by default.
The response rejects or challenges a single job-title-based mega-skill.
The response proposes multiple small lifecycle or work-stream capabilities based on observed work.
